title: Elegance and Boundaries
description: Review ownership boundaries, naming, public API width, god files, cohesion, and SRP/DRY violations. Prefer small product-domain modules.
body: Review ownership boundaries, naming, public API width, god files, cohesion, and SRP/DRY violations. Prefer small product-domain modules. Workflow: read binding roadmap and source, inspect relevant implementation, identify owner package, verify generated artifacts and acceptance coverage, then report exact evidence. Non-goals: placeholders, shallow descriptions, or docs that are not backed by code.
